text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, puff...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: One more! YAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As promised, Matikanetannhauser is training as
hard as she can in order to make the Japan Cup a
special day. She's nearly at her absolute peak!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Check it out, Trainer! I posted that I'm going to
do my best tomorrow at the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Look how many people are wishing me luck in the
comments!

text_block_list.name: Comment
text_block_list.text:
"Your constant optimism gives me courage! Good
luck!"

text_block_list.name: Comment
text_block_list.text:
"I'll be in the stands cheering for you tomorrow!
Give it your all and leave everyone in the dust!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The comment section is full of passionate and
encouraging messages.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Everyone's really looking forward to the
race, huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: All riiiiight!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I've got one more lap in me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At long last, the day of the Japan Cup is here,
but for some reason, Matikanetannhauser hasn't
shown up yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just when I start wondering if she's gone to the
wrong racecourse again...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
"Hello? Is this Tannhauser's trainer? I've got
something to tell you, but I need you to stay
calm..."

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: "Tannhauser got a nosebleed and passed out."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's getting some tests done at the hospital right
now. They said it's not serious, but apparently she
won't be able to run today...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
"I've made up my mind! I want the power to move
people's hearts!"

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: "I want to be a star!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I urgently withdraw her from the Japan Cup and
rush to the hospital.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh... Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Looks like I've gone and done it again! I always
mess up at important times like this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I was just too excited for today. I got
dizzy, and the next thing I knew, I was on the
ground...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tears start rolling down Matikanetannhauser's
face.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's going on? Why am I crying?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I-I can't believe myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh. Are you crying?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: N-Nature?! What about your part-time job?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Like I could focus on work with you here down in
the dumps like this!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I know how hard you were working for today.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Everything was perfect. I was more ready than I've
ever been! And yet... now... when it mattered
most!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
This might be it for me. I don't think I'm cut out to
be a star!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser hangs her head, but Nice
Nature looks at her resolutely.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta chin up and keep moving forward.
You're not gonna get anywhere moping around
like this.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I should know, since you're the one who taught
me that.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Sure, you might have let down all the people who
were excited for today's race.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You might be a little further away now from being
the star you want to be.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But you've gotta keep your head up.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...That's what I think, at least. What about you?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I think...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She only gets that far, when...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! Machitan's crying?! Don't cry, Turbo's
here!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Lower your voice, Turbo. We're in a hospital.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At that moment, Twin Turbo and Ikuno Dictus
enter the room.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wh-what are you two doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
There's something we'd like to show you,
Tannhauser. Look.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno Dictus holds out her phone and shows us
Tannhauser's Umatter feed.

text_block_list.name: Comforting Post
text_block_list.text:
"Don't worry! You'll get the win you've been
waiting for next time!"

text_block_list.name: Encouraging Post
text_block_list.text:
"You're definitely gonna come in first next time!
I'll make sure I'm there for it too! You got this!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Post after post shows people trying to comfort
Matikanetannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
All these posts are from people who heard you
had to withdraw from the race.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Clearly, you had a lot of attention on you this
time.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It's safe to say that people were expecting more
from you this race than any before.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That said... there is still next time. If you can't win
today, win next time. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Next time... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Those are words she's heard many times before.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! You've said those same words yourself
countless times!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Yeah, Machitan! You better win next time!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Win next time and show everyone how awesome
you are!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Turbo... Everyone...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Matikanetannhauser looks up at her friends.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yeah... You're absolutely right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She wipes the tears from her face.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna do it! I'm not giving up!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna win next time for sure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a few days of recuperation,
Matikanetannhauser returns to the academy...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm all set!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Let's make my next race the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I know! It's a huge race that gets
tons of attention because of all the heavy-hitters
that run there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hayahide, who's more popular than anyone else
right now, will be running, and it's also Teio's first
race back after her injury.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Not only that, but Palmer, Ticket, Nature, and
Rice will be there too. So many big names!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And on top of that, I'm fresh out of the hospital
after passing out, so I'm completely behind! But
even so!
choice_data_list: Even so, let's win it this time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If you want to win, then you have to cross the
finish line first. I've learned that from her over the
past three years.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: You know me too well!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I wanna win the Arima Kinen. This time I'm
absolutely, positively gonna win!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna win, and I'm gonna be the star!
choice_data_list: That's right. You've got it this time for sure!
That's right. You've got it this time for sure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next race is the Arima Kinen. All we have to
do is win and achieve her long-awaited victory.
